name: wireloom-validate
description: Validate Wireloom markdown blocks when Codex stops.

interface.shortDescription: Validate changed Wireloom markdown blocks on Stop.
interface.longDescription: Adds a Codex Stop hook that checks changed markdown files for ```wireloom blocks, validates them with the configured Wireloom parser, blocks once with structured feedback, and then allows a later stop attempt to avoid loops.
interface.defaultPrompt: Validate Wireloom markdown blocks before stopping.
